name: Denzel Washington
title: Actor & Director
bio: American actor, director, and producer. Two-time Academy Award winner and one of the most respected actors in Hollywood history.
faith: Washington is a devout Christian who has spoken openly about his faith for decades. He once considered becoming a preacher and has said, 'Put God first in everything you do. Everything that I have is by the grace of God.' He reads the Bible daily and has been a regular churchgoer his entire life.

videos.title: Denzel Washington - Put God First
videos.note: Denzel's commencement speeches about faith are widely viewed

tagline: Put God first in Hollywood and never wavered
